name: The White House
subject: The road ahead for tax reform
body:
Your 1600 Daily:
| | [ ](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=0a64b66cb723f1de345c52fbe5c603cc45594bdc9ac0175097425e954011af8e16b50a8b2a7c42bc35071d3fb016354bb1954537e848b4ca) **The road ahead for tax reform**
After a busy week of discussions and compromise, Senate Republicans backed up a major promise to the American people by passing the Tax Cuts and Jobs Act early Saturday morning. The bill now advances to a congressional conference committee, which will reconcile any differences between the Senate’s version and similar legislation passed by the House last month. This process—an indispensable component of American democracy—will ensure that all voices are heard and that the final product sent to President Donald J. Trump later this month is the bill’s strongest version yet. The President applauds the Senate for its work and looks forward to signing this momentous tax cut into law in time for Christmas. Click here to read [the full statement](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=0a64b66cb723f1de5c77517e3542d76acc8c6bc5043c98e74d33a589a183527708444e1d771af0a9b999c2ff164e6a9f665b5b04808c4ad1) on the Senate vote.
**What President Trump will tell Utah today**
President Trump will travel to Salt Lake City, Utah, today to deliver an important message at the State Capitol. In April, the President ordered an extensive review of all large federal land expansions made since 1996 under the Antiquities Act—a 1906 law intended to safeguard national monuments that’s become a pretext for massive federal land grabs. That report will be released this week. When the President goes to Utah today, he will lay out his proclamation to modify the boundaries for both the Bears Ears and Grand Staircase Escalante national monuments, explaining how certain past abuses of the Antiquities Act have harmed local communities. It’s an important decision worth illuminating clearly. Here’s what the President’s proclamation does:
* Corrects past federal overreach
* Protects objects of national significance and prioritizes public access
* Facilitates infrastructure upgrades and maintenance
* Ensures tribal cultural use
* Protects hunting and fishing rights

Here’s what it **doesn’t** do:
* Sell public lands wholesale
* Close or shrink national parks
* Drill for oil in national parks
* Leave tribal artifacts or fossils unprotected

[Watch the President’s speech live at 3:30 p.m. EST today.](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=0a64b66cb723f1de9f6f5dfd349ce5a2b7592ec69c25aa5b6f363968bcc54d2c31510a7f6c25d1ae6a009afb7fd92cc8a9a8742c76a3afa1)
**December update on the President’s nominations**
On Friday, President Trump sent 12 nominations to the Senate for approval, including Jeffrey DeWit of Arizona to be chief financial officer of the National Aeronautics and Space Administration, James Williams of Utah to be chief financial officer of the Department of Labor, and Mark Schneider of the District of Columbia to be director of the Institute of Education Science at the Department of Labor. Last week, President Trump nominated respected monetary economist Marvin Goodfriend of Pennsylvania to become a member of the Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System. View the full list of nominations [here.](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=0a64b66cb723f1deb11174aba6f7259d23a3c2e409913fbed4e356fa38afa406af5416546a3c299360ad3485f27e58df48b1908597acd7f8)
# Photo of the Day
**President Donald J. Trump boards Marine One** | December 2, 2017 (Official White House Photo by Shealah Craighead)
# POTUS TODAY
President Trump is traveling to Utah today, where he will meet with leaders of the Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints before giving remarks at the Utah State Capitol this afternoon.
# COMING UP
The President will host Senate leaders in the Roosevelt Room of the White House tomorrow, while Vice President Mike Pence travels to Capitol Hill to join the Senate Republican Policy Committee’s weekly lunch. On Wednesday, the President will hold a meeting of his Cabinet at the White House.
# Special Note
The Spring 2018 White House Internship Program is now open for applications through January 12. Read more about the program and apply—or pass the link along to someone who can!—[here. ](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=0a64b66cb723f1de676767206e1281070e95addc77b8a98954d2d85940f87fb4c1237f5aa1ec8a8c9c28a2addcc8626258dc10eb7969011f)
---

[Privacy Policy](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=0a64b66cb723f1deff889a3475db470a45674c7a2dbd4108b4cb7a123caf8f398ce50fa027a72608236d021e36d75cbb599b4e1cf127316b) | [Contact the White House](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=0a64b66cb723f1de880619dde373ba7ce79456d4264cdc7755a50321049aab636657a111e46af1ee30a45872738f5f6676ef007c2cbb14ba) | [Unsubscribe](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/unsub_center.aspx?qs=d453c42a6560d1d4673285284253fa1067b1df7359e8a8a7562f15f95cbbf3ffa75318eb9a69382f2072f8321cebf649743690bc5b229b95)
---

name: petition@maggiehassan.com
subject: Stop tax breaks for corporate special interests >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdfb9/2a380d31/90d1b6/fe2326/2154324523/VEsH/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdfb9/2a380d31/90d1b6/fe2326/2154324523/VEsE/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
Hi there -- Just before 2 AM Saturday, mere hours after the final bill had been drafted, Senate Republicans passed a tax plan that lines the pockets of corporate special interests and forces middle class families to pick up the tab.
Now, Senate and House Republicans just need to iron out a few minor differences between their partisan bills -- both of which represent a massive giveaway to corporate special interests. And once they do that, they can send it to Donald Trump's desk to be signed into law.
**This is EXTREMELY urgent: Your voice is the only thing that has stopped devastating legislation in the past.[Make your voice heard again and sign our petition urging them NOT to pass this bill.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdfb9/2a380d31/90d1b6/fe2327/2154324523/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjAzMjY0In0=/ "http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/s/201712_HouseTaxBill?source=e20171204_HouseTax1_act&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=03264")**
If this tax giveaway becomes law, $1.5 TRILLION will be added to the debt, $25 BILLION will be cut from Medicare, 13 MILLION fewer people will have health coverage, and it will become harder for small businesses to get their feet on the ground.
It's clear: this scam of a bill isn't about helping hard-working Americans like you. It's about giving tax giveaways to the Wall Street billionaire and corporate millionaire donors who back Washington Republicans' campaigns.
[**Please sign now to call on Congressional Republicans to protect the middle class and stand against this heartless, irresponsible sham of a tax bill.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdfb9/2a380d31/90d1b6/fe2327/2154324523/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjAzMjY0In0=/ "http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/s/201712_HouseTaxBill?source=e20171204_HouseTax1_act&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=03264")
Thanks for speaking up -- we're counting on you.
-- Team Maggie

[Contribute](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdfb9/2a380d31/90d1b6/fe2320/2154324523/VEsD/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX2dlbmVyYWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDE3MTIwNF9UYXhCaWxsSG91c2UxX2FjdCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_general?refcode=e20171204_TaxBillHouse1_act&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
To unsubscribe from the Maggie for NH email list, please click here: [Unsubscribe](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdfb9/2a380d31/90d1b6/fe2321/2154324523/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://act.maggiehassan.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")

Paid for by Maggie for NH

Contributions or gifts to Maggie for NH are not tax deductible.

Maggie for NH
PO Box 298
Concord, NH 03302 United States

name: rapid-response@dscc.org
subject: Republicans passed their tax plan. Make them regret it.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
Friday night, Senate Republicans passed their disastrous tax plan along party lines. Make them regret their vote now >>
---
[](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/support-democrats?refcode=DPE-20171204-Rapid_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
_**New York Times: "Senate Republicans Pass Sweeping Tax Bill"**_
They did it, team. Friday night, Senate Republicans passed their disastrous tax plan along party lines.

This tax scam stacks the deck against the American people, all to benefit the wealthy and big corporations -- and it includes an attack on Obamacare that will throw our health care system into chaos.

[**We have to fight back immediately. Pitch in $1 right now to make Republicans regret their tax vote and replace the GOP with Democratic Senators in 2018.**](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/support-democrats?refcode=DPE-20171204-Rapid_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")

The GOP rushed this bill through at 2 am on a Saturday morning, all to hide what their plan really does.

According to the Congressional Budget Office, 13 million people stand to lose their health coverage because of this bill. Everyone else could see their premiums rise by double-digits, along with higher tax bills.

This vote proves that Senate Republicans are more interested in serving their wealthy donors than working on policies that help American families.

**The best way for us to respond to this vote is send the GOP a clear message that we 're ready to hold them accountable. Contribute $1 right now to defeat Republicans in 2018:**

[**http://www.dscc.org/hold-GOP-accountable-on-tax-plan**](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/support-democrats?refcode=DPE-20171204-Rapid_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")

Thank you,

Team DSCC

**Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee
120 Maryland Ave. NE
Washington, DC 20002** Paid for by the DSCC, dscc.org,
and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of the DSCC's grassroots network. Please add us to your address book or approved senders list to make sure you keep receiving DSCC updates. Emails are a critical way for us to stay in touch with our grassroots supporters. 99% of the DSCC's contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200. We also strive to keep you updated on issues related to the Democratic Party's values.

If you'd like to take a break from DSCC emails, [click here](http://action.dscc.org/page/m/3954d286/2b07114c/d841dd4b/7318007d/2647949443/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/take-an-email-break?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").

If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please [click here](http://action.dscc.org/page/m/3954d286/2b07114c/d841dd4b/7318007c/2647949443/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/supportdscc?refcode=DPE-disclaimer"). Together, we're going to take back the Senate, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. If you'd like to stop receiving all emails from the DSCC, please [click here](http://action.dscc.org/page/m/3954d286/2b07114c/d841dd4b/7318007f/2647949443/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/content/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). We greatly appreciate your continued support. Contributions or gifts to the DSCC are not tax deductible.

name: DNC Polling Update
subject: [Alabama Update] Doug Jones is winning, Derek
body:

If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523f8b/4067b0a/4ce7d0e18/7e5be247/3567405902/VEsHBA/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=11+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20171204_dnc_nd&source=em_20171204_dnc_nd&refcode=em_20171204_dnc_nd"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523f8b/4067b0a/4ce7d0e18/7e5be244/3567405902/VEsHBw/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=12+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20171204_dnc_nd&source=em_20171204_dnc_nd&refcode=em_20171204_dnc_nd"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523f8b/4067b0a/4ce7d0e18/7e5be245/3567405902/VEsHBg/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=13+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20171204_dnc_nd&source=em_20171204_dnc_nd&refcode=em_20171204_dnc_nd") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523f8b/4067b0a/4ce7d0e18/7e5be242/3567405902/VEsHAQ/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=14+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20171204_dnc_nd&source=em_20171204_dnc_nd&refcode=em_20171204_dnc_nd"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.

|

name: Stephanie Schriock, EMILY's List
subject: A big, bold goal >>
body:
We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c6ed8/24c69fd9/15a833bd9/189109b9/2631389079/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQEFEL04N_digital_email_20171204_598seats_inact&source=WQEFEL04N_digital_email_20171204_598seats_inact")
---

Peter,

598.

That's how many state legislative seats we want to recruit pro-choice Democratic women to run for.

It's a bold goal, but Election Day 2017 showed us that electing a wave of pro-choice Democratic women at the state and local level is doable if we support them early and often.

And early is NOW.

**[Donate $3 to help recruit and train women to run for the 598 state legislative seats we're targeting.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c6ed8/24c69fd9/15a833bd9/189109ba/2631389079/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20171201_email_598seats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+Donate+3+to+help+recruit+and+train+women&utm_campaign=WQEFEL04N_digital_email_20171204_598seats_inact&source=WQEFEL04N_digital_email_20171204_598seats_inact")**

What we did in Virginia -- where we helped 11 women flip seats in the House of Delegates -- and across the country this year showed that neither this community nor voters want to play it small and safe. Now is a moment for big, bold plans.

So here's how we plan to go big:

The 598 seats we're targeting are spread across 26 states. There are eight state legislative chambers we want to flip from red to blue and seven we want to hold blue.

In five states, we plan to make big Democratic gains or break up Republican supermajorities, stopping Republican strangleholds that let them pass anti-woman, anti-choice laws with impunity.

We're setting the bar incredibly high, but it's because we know that when this community comes together, we can do what others deem impossible.

**Donate $3 to help recruit and support pro-choice Democratic women who can win hundreds of state legislative seats across the country:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Our-Big-Goal](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c6ed8/24c69fd9/15a833bd9/189109bb/2631389079/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20171201_email_598seats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgOurBigGoal&utm_campaign=WQEFEL04N_digital_email_20171204_598seats_inact&source=WQEFEL04N_digital_email_20171204_598seats_inact")**

Thanks,

Stephanie Schriock
President, EMILY's List

[](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c6ed8/24c69fd9/15a833bd9/189109b4/2631389079/VEsC/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20171201_email_598seats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=4&utm_campaign=WQEFEL04N_digital_email_20171204_598seats_inact&source=WQEFEL04N_digital_email_20171204_598seats_inact")

|
# EMILY's List is a community of over five million members that helps elect pro-choice Democratic women to office.
---

|
---
Paid for by EMILY's List [www.emilyslist.org](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c6ed8/24c69fd9/15a833bd9/189109b5/2631389079/VEsD/ "http://www.emilyslist.org/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=5+-+wwwemilyslistorg&utm_campaign=WQEFEL04N_digital_email_20171204_598seats_inact&source=WQEFEL04N_digital_email_20171204_598seats_inact") and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
1800 M Street NW, Suite 375N, Washington, DC 20036 Thank you for being a supporter of EMILY's List. This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Inbox overcrowded? Sign up to get less email [here](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c6ed8/24c69fd9/15a833bd9/189109b6/2631389079/VEsA/ "http://action.emilyslist.org/page/s/less-email-private-bc?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=6+-+here&utm_campaign=WQEFEL04N_digital_email_20171204_598seats_inact&source=WQEFEL04N_digital_email_20171204_598seats_inact"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you want to stop receiving all email, unsubscribe [here](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c6ed8/24c69fd9/15a833bd9/189109b7/2631389079/VEsB/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=7+-+here&utm_campaign=WQEFEL04N_digital_email_20171204_598seats_inact&source=WQEFEL04N_digital_email_20171204_598seats_inact"). Have a question? Feel free to drop us a line at [information@emilyslist.org](mailto:information@emilyslist.org) or simply reply to this email.

name: Jay Inslee
subject: 2018, here we come.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
Sign your name to help Democrats take back governors' mansions in 2018.

| [](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MTI0OTUyOTUS1&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTMwMDM2OTc1MQS2&mt=1&rt=0) Friend, A very exciting announcement: Today, I'll take on a new role as chair of the Democratic Governors Association. While we continue the fight in Washington state, we'll also be working nationwide to bring real leadership to every state. This is a **critical post in 2018** for a few reasons: First, there are 36 states that will be electing governors in 2018 -- 26 of which are currently held by Republicans. Across the country, we have a huge opportunity to win big, including traditionally red states. [**I 'm taking action. I know the impact Democratic governors can have on people's lives and I'm working to win across America in 2018. If you are too, sign your name right now.**](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MTI0OTUyOTUS1&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTMwMDM2OTc1MQS2&mt=1&rt=0) Second, the governors elected in 2018 will be in office after the 2020 Census, when the new round of redistricting begins. After 2010, Republican governors used their influence to gerrymander congressional districts and disenfranchise voters. I'm going to do everything I can to make sure we fill those 36 seats with Democrats who will protect everyone's right to representation in Congress. Finally, the chair's job will be to show what leadership and progress can look like in the states and to stand up when President Trump's policies hurt our states. I'll be leading with my fellow Democratic governors on solutions to the economy, health care, and clean energy -- issues this Washington is making progress on every day. [](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MTI0OTUyOTUS1&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTMwMDM2OTc1MQS2&mt=1&rt=0) [**This is a huge opportunity. And I need you with me. Are you ready to win in 2018 and beyond? Add your name now.**](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MTI0OTUyOTUS1&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTMwMDM2OTc1MQS2&mt=1&rt=0) Very truly yours, Jay Inslee | [SIGN ON »](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MTI0OTUyOTUS1&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTMwMDM2OTc1MQS2&mt=1&rt=0)
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here to unsubscribe](http://www.jayinslee.com/unsubscribe?m=12495295&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&j=MTMwMDM2OTc1MQS2&l=6586026&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com). Contributions or gifts to Jay Inslee for Washington are not tax deductible. | Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
---
All content (C) Jay Inslee for Washington, All Rights Reserved
PO Box 21067, Seattle, WA 98111
[Privacy Policy](http://www.jayinslee.com/privacy)

This is a critical post in 2018 for a few reasons: First, there are 36 states that will be electing governors in 2018 -- 26 of which are currently held by Republicans. Across the country, we have a huge opportunity to win big, including traditionally red states. Second, the governors elected in 2018 will be in office after the 2020 Census, when the new round of redistricting begins. name: Our Revolution
subject: Unity Reform Commission's Meeting in D.C.
body:
#
Friends,
Our Revolution is working to create long-lasting political change. We believe that one of the ways to create this change is to work from within the Democratic Party to create a more open and inclusive party. Our Revolution President Nina Turner, alongside Our Revolution Board Members Jane Kleeb, Larry Cohen, Lucy Flores, and Jim Zogby are focused on transforming the party as members of the Democratic National Committee's Unity Reform Commission.

The DNC's Unity Reform Commission's fifth, and final, meeting will be on Friday, December 8 and Saturday, December 9, here, in Washington D.C.
[**Unity Reform Commission Meeting**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7ae25/bed43eb/27a2c7e5/75ff7052/1880333083/VEsH/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/unity-reform-commission-washington-dc-")
December 8-9, 2017
Marriott Wardman Park
Washington, D.C. 20008
RSVP below to join us for the upcoming meeting and show solidarity with Our Revolution's board members and their fight to reform the Democratic Party.
****[rsvp](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7ae25/bed43eb/27a2c7e5/75ff7052/1880333083/VEsE/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/unity-reform-commission-washington-dc-")****
We hope to see you there.
In Solidarity,
The Team at Our Revolution
PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
603 2ND ST, NE
WASHINGTON, DC, 20002

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a 501(c)(4) organization. Donations to Our Revolution are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. All donations are made to support Our Revolution's general mission and are not designated for any specific activity.
603 2nd St NE, Washington, DC 20002
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7ae25/bed43eb/27a2c7e5/75ff705d/1880333083/VEsF/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/information-update?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7ae25/bed43eb/27a2c7e5/75ff705c/1880333083/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjIyMTIzIn0=/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/OR-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7ae25/bed43eb/27a2c7e5/75ff705f/1880333083/VEsD/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Help us continue transforming American politics and fighting for progressive candidates and causes by [contributing to Our Revolution here](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7ae25/bed43eb/27a2c7e5/75ff705e/1880333083/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ourrevolution?refcode=email-footer-OR").

name: DSCC Polling Alert
subject: Washington Post: Jones 50 - Moore 47
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
A new Washington Post poll on the Alabama Senate special election shows Doug Jones leading Roy Moore, 50% - 47%. Keep up the momentum NOW >>
---
[](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/take-on-republicans-everywhere?refcode=DPE-20171204-PollAlert-ProsHV&recurring=auto&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
_**Washington Post poll: Doug Jones 50%, Roy Moore 47%
[Pitch in $1 right now to fight for EVERY state >>](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/take-on-republicans-everywhere?refcode=DPE-20171204-PollAlert-ProsHV&recurring=auto&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**_
Team,

There's a new _Washington Post_ poll out on the Alabama Senate special election -- and it shows Doug Jones leading Roy Moore, 50% - 47%.

This is exciting news, but it's no proof that Doug is winning this race -- the numbers are so close, that it's a statistical TIE.

And with no clear frontrunner less than two weeks before the special election, Doug needs every ounce of support from us to take on Roy Moore in the final stretch.

[**There 's no time to waste. Pitch in $1 right now to keep up the momentum as we fight for every state >>**](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/take-on-republicans-everywhere?refcode=DPE-20171204-PollAlert-ProsHV&recurring=auto&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")

The _Washington Post_ called the race "neck and neck" and declared that the December 12th special election will be "a nail-biter."

The best thing we can do right now is to make sure Doug has the resources to run the strongest campaign possible. With less than two weeks to go, he's counting on supporters like you to step up right now.

**Contribute $1 now to support Doug and fund our efforts to fight for every single Senate seat:**

[**http://www.dscc.org/no-time-to-waste**](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/take-on-republicans-everywhere?refcode=DPE-20171204-PollAlert-ProsHV&recurring=auto&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")

Thank you,

Team DSCC

**Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee
120 Maryland Ave. NE
Washington, DC 20002** Paid for by the DSCC, dscc.org,
and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of the DSCC's grassroots network. Please add us to your address book or approved senders list to make sure you keep receiving DSCC updates. Emails are a critical way for us to stay in touch with our grassroots supporters. 99% of the DSCC's contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200. We also strive to keep you updated on issues related to the Democratic Party's values.

If you'd like to take a break from DSCC emails, [click here](http://action.dscc.org/page/m/3954d291/2b07114c/d8fa7604/73187465/3351374644/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/take-an-email-break?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").

If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please [click here](http://action.dscc.org/page/m/3954d291/2b07114c/d8fa7604/73187464/3351374644/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/supportdscc?refcode=DPE-disclaimer"). Together, we're going to take back the Senate, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. If you'd like to stop receiving all emails from the DSCC, please [click here](http://action.dscc.org/page/m/3954d291/2b07114c/d8fa7604/73187467/3351374644/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/content/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). We greatly appreciate your continued support. Contributions or gifts to the DSCC are not tax deductible.
---

name: Special Election Update
subject: The Senate race in Alabama
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Florida Democratic Party
body:
**BREAKING: Trump endorses Roy Moore in Alabama Senate race
[Stand with Alabama Democrats to stop Roy Moore next Tuesday! Chip in $5 now >>](http://act.floridadems. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stop-roy-moore?amount=5&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&city=Englewood&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=1+-+Stand+with+Alabama+Democrats+to+stop+Roy&utm_campaign=FDP_EM_FR_WL_171204_1_1&source=FDP_EM_FR_WL_171204_1_1&refcode=FDP_EM_FR_WL_171204_1_1")** Team,

This is HORRIBLE. President Trump just endorsed Roy Moore -- who is accused of molestation and sexual assault -- in the Alabama Senate race.
[](http://act.floridadems. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stop-roy-moore?amount=5&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&city=Englewood&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=2&utm_campaign=FDP_EM_FR_WL_171204_1_1&source=FDP_EM_FR_WL_171204_1_1&refcode=FDP_EM_FR_WL_171204_1_1") The Alabama Democratic Party is working around the clock to pull off a win on December 12 and stop Moore, and they need your help.

**[We're aiming to raise $25,000 in the final week before the election to help Alabama Democrats defeat Roy Moore and his disgusting politics. Will you donate $5 or more to help Alabama Democrats' cause?](http://act.floridadems. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stop-roy-moore?amount=5&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&city=Englewood&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=3+-+Wersquore+aiming+to+raise+25000+in+the+f&utm_campaign=FDP_EM_FR_WL_171204_1_1&source=FDP_EM_FR_WL_171204_1_1&refcode=FDP_EM_FR_WL_171204_1_1")** _**Democrats are depending on you.** If you've saved your payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will be automatically split between the Florida Democratic Party and the Alabama Democratic Party:_ **[Donate $5 now!](http://act.floridadems. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stop-roy-moore?amount=5&express_lane=true&refcode2=exllinks&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&city=Englewood&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=4+-+Donate+ask+now&utm_campaign=FDP_EM_FR_WL_171204_1_1&source=FDP_EM_FR_WL_171204_1_1&refcode=FDP_EM_FR_WL_171204_1_1")
[Donate $25 now!](http://act.floridadems. clean_body: BREAKING: Trump endorses Roy Moore in Alabama Senate race "" Team, This is HORRIBLE. President Trump just endorsed Roy Moore -- who is accused of molestation and sexual assault -- in the Alabama Senate race. "" The Alabama Democratic Party is working around the clock to pull off a win on December 12 and stop Moore, and they need your help. "" Democrats are depending on you. If you've saved your payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will be automatically split between the Florida Democratic Party and the Alabama Democratic Party: "" "" "" "" "" Thanks for standing up for Democrats when it counts, Florida Democrats | Paid for by Florida Democratic Party. Not Authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee We believe that emails are a vital way for the campaign to stay in direct contact with supporters. Click "" if you'd like to unsubscribe from these messages. Thanks for your support of Florida Democrats!. Contributions or gifts to the Florida Democratic Party are not tax deductible.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Indiana=20Republican=20Party?=
subject: Full Agenda: Congress of Counties
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](http://mailchi.mp/indiana/full-agenda-congress-of-counties?e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| |
---
| | _Congress of Counties Agenda Announced_
---
| [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=2df3a53f9a&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| **Just announced -- **our [full Congress of Counties schedule](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=68f88eb334&e=1acd9bb3d6) is **now available**! With two days jam-packed with riveting presentations and discussions, we've put together an event that you won't want to miss!
**[REGISTER NOW](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=a5dfd14b95&e=1acd9bb3d6)**
For just $85, **you'll learn from top experts** in fields like fundraising, building and sharing a message, recruiting volunteers and targeting voters.
**[View our full schedule of breakout sessions](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=440a9af64c&e=1acd9bb3d6)[ and presenters](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=d7ba406ce0&e=1acd9bb3d6)** \-- with fun, informative presentations that will get you skilled-up and ready to help secure more big Republican victories in 2018: **Breakout Session #1:**
_Making the Decision: Recruiting Candidates & Launching a Campaign
Understanding Social Media: Facebook, Twitter & Snapchat
Republican Leadership Initiative
Campaign Finance & Fundraising_

**Breakout Session #2: **
_Communications Strategies for Parties & Campaigns
Election Administration
Data Center: The Basics
State Party Rules_

**Breakout Session #3:**
_County Chairs Only: Trials, Tribulations & Best Practices
State Party Rules
Republican Leadership Initiative
Defeating Joe Donnelly: The Plan_

**Breakout Session #4:**
_Inside the General Assembly: What’s On The Horizon
Data Analytics & GOP Data Center: In-Depth
Communications Strategies for Parties & Campaigns
Campaign Finance & Fundraising_

**Breakout Session #5:**
_County Officer Training: The Roles & Responsibilities
Republican Leadership Initiative

*Schedule and presenters subject to change_
The festivities **will begin at 2:30 p.m. on Friday, January 12** , and **will conclude by 1:30 p.m. on Saturday, January 13**.

With the great information you'll learn through these breakout sessions, you'll be **gaining key skills** that will be crucial for the success of **your campaigns** and **your local Republican parties!**

We still have more special guests and activities to announce, so [**BOOK NOW**](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=2179fe63b9&e=1acd9bb3d6) and secure your spot at Congress of Counties!
---
| | | | | | | [](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=a4aa22ca86&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| | [](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=9a60ade5e5&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| | [](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=50aa412f32&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
|
---
| _Copyright © 2017 Indiana Republican State Committee, Inc., All rights reserved._
You are receiving this email because you opted in.

**Our mailing address is:**
Indiana Republican State Committee, Inc.101 W. Ohio St., Suite 2200Indianapolis, IN 46204
[Add us to your address book](//indgop.us11.list-manage.com/vcard?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=70b6cdf951)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/profile?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=70b6cdf951&e=1acd9bb3d6) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=70b6cdf951&e=1acd9bb3d6&c=017f5a6bb8).
---
